_note: Portkey is a cloud-hosted gateway — no local server to deploy. Configure a virtual key in the Portkey dashboard that maps to your OpenAI key, then fill the values below.
setup_steps: 1. Sign in at https://app.portkey.ai and create a Virtual Key pointing to openai.
2. Set PORTKEY_API_KEY in .env to your Portkey API key (sk-portkey-...).
3. Set PORTKEY_URL=https://api.portkey.ai in .env (or your self-hosted endpoint).
4. The x-portkey-virtual-key header below is optional if your API key already has a default provider.
